# LLMCosts.dev — Tencent Models Pricing
> Source: LLMCosts.dev — https://llmcosts.dev
> Updated: 2026-04-09
> Route cheaper via OpenRouter: https://openrouter.ai/?ref=llmcosts
(Part 1)

| Model | Provider | Input/1M | Output/1M | Cached/1M | Context | ELO | Tier | Type |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|---------|---------|-----|------|------|
| [Tencent: Hunyuan A13B Instruct](https://llmcosts.dev/models/hunyuan-a13b-instruct) | Tencent | $0.14 | $0.57 | $None | 131,072 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
